checks.label: H1 Tag
checks.description: Clear, descriptive H1 matching the page's primary topic

checks.label: Title Tag
checks.description: Unique title under 60 chars with primary keyword

checks.label: Meta Description
checks.description: Compelling description, 150-160 chars

checks.label: Canonical URL
checks.description: Self-referencing canonical tag

checks.label: Schema Markup
checks.description: JSON-LD structured data (Article, FAQPage, HowTo, etc.)

checks.label: Organization Schema
checks.description: Organization schema in @graph (site-wide is fine)

checks.label: Breadcrumbs
checks.description: BreadcrumbList schema + visible breadcrumb navigation

checks.label: Answer Capsule
checks.description: 40-60 word direct answer at top of content — what AI extracts and cites

checks.label: Open Graph Tags
checks.description: og:title, og:description, og:image for social sharing

checks.label: FAQ Section
checks.description: Question-answer pairs with FAQPage schema (genuine questions only)

checks.label: Images
checks.description: At least 1 relevant image — multi-modal content gets +156% citations

checks.label: Image Alt Text
checks.description: Descriptive alt text on all images

checks.label: Video
checks.description: Embedded video — multi-modal with video gets +317% citations

checks.label: Comparison Table
checks.description: Data table comparing options — 2.5x citation rate

checks.label: Structured Lists
checks.description: Bullet or numbered lists — AI-friendly scannable format

checks.label: Question H2s
checks.description: H2 headings phrased as questions people ask

checks.label: Inbound Internal Links
checks.description: At least 3 internal links pointing to this page

checks.label: Outbound Internal Links
checks.description: Links to related pages on the site

checks.label: Content Depth
checks.description: 500+ words for content pages (2000+ for pillar pages, 120-180 for Q&A)

checks.label: Author Attribution
checks.description: Named author with credentials — E-E-A-T signal

checks.label: Published/Modified Date
checks.description: Visible date — content updated <90 days gets 3x more citations

checks.label: Inline Citations
checks.description: References to external sources — +132% visibility

checks.label: Definition Statement
checks.description: Clear 'X is...' definition near page start — AI extracts these

checks.label: Call to Action
checks.description: Clear next step for the visitor

checks.label: Mobile Responsive
checks.description: Viewport meta tag + responsive design
